items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 11 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「At SIGGRAPH, NVIDIA Advances Graphics and Simulation With Agentic and Physical AI」、「Hugging Face says an AI agent hacked its infrastructure, and it used AI to fight back」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。

items.title: At SIGGRAPH, NVIDIA Advances Graphics and Simulation With Agentic and Physical AI
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「Agent Skill、Harness、工具调用和自动化研发」。原文摘要显示：From open models to real-time simulation, AI and graphics breakthroughs are transforming media, content creation and robotics.
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。

items.title: Behavioral Privacy Leakage in Agentic Negotiation: Formalizing and Mitigating Inference Attacks via Randomized Policies
items.summary: Autonomous negotiation agents are increasingly deployed in high-stakes settings such as insurance and procurement. While cryptographic techniques protect explicitly disclosed constraint values, they fail to address a subtler threat: behavioral privacy leakage, where an adversary…
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。

items.title: Benchmarking Sensor Robustness in Plasma Diagnostic Models: A Systematic Evaluation on TokaMark
items.summary: Plasma diagnostic models for tokamak fusion devices are almost universally evaluated on clean, complete sensor data. In practice, fusion diagnostics fail regularly: acquisition systems start late, individual sensors die, and signal dropouts cluster precisely when a plasma disrup…
items.insightText: 先快速判断它是否包含可复用方法、架构或工程经验，再决定是否进入日报深读。

items.title: Agon: Competitive Cross-Model RL with Implicit Rival Grading of Reasoning
items.summary: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (e.g. GRPO) is the engine behind today's reasoning models, yet it grades only the final answer. On hard problems this trains models to write more rather than to think better, since the trace itself is never graded and no label for g…
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。

items.title: Moonshot pauses new Kimi K3 subscriptions after GPU demand maxes out in 48 hours
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「AI 技术演进和可复用工程实践」。原文摘要显示：Moonshot has temporarily stopped selling new subscriptions for its Kimi K3 model as demand nearly maxed out its GPU capacity within 48 hours. The company plans to split its subscription model to spread computing power m…
items.insightText: 先快速判断它是否包含可复用方法、架构或工程经验，再决定是否进入日报深读。

items.title: REBASE: Reference-Background Subspace Elimination for Training-Free In-Context Segmentation
items.summary: Training-free in-context segmentation enables new object categories to be introduced at inference time from a single annotated reference image, eliminating the retraining and memory overhead of class-incremental learning. Recent approaches achieve this by combining vision founda…
items.insightText: 重点看数据采集、链路诊断、排序指标和线上一致性校验，判断是否可迁移到地址 Agent 自进化架构。
